title: Spiloxene aquatica
taxonomy: Spiloxene aquatica belongs to the family Hypoxidaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The genus Spiloxene is part of the order Asparagales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This plant is often found in moist, subtropical regions and is known for its unique, delicate appearance. Spiloxene aquatica is typically characterized by its solitary flowers and slender, grass-like leaves.
